pr.title: Rename publish skill to host and fix --remote flag

fixes: Fixed publish skill uploading to local R2 simulator instead of remote Cloudflare bucket by adding the required --remote flag
improvements: Renamed skill from "publish" to "host" for clearer intent
Switched from npx to direct wrangler invocation for faster, more reliable uploads
Added Wrangler installation check and auto-install prompt to setup script
Surfaced upload errors instead of silencing them

pr.title: fix(publish): add --remote flag and require Wrangler CLI

fixes: Fixed publish skill uploading to local R2 simulator instead of remote Cloudflare bucket by adding the required --remote flag to all wrangler commands
improvements: Switched from npx to direct wrangler invocation for faster, more reliable uploads
Added Wrangler installation check and auto-install prompt to setup script
Surfaced upload errors instead of silencing them

pr.title: Add prerequisites check to ship skill

features: Added prerequisites check to the ship skill that verifies git, gh, jq, and node are installed and authenticated before running

pr.title: Add publish skill for uploading files to Cloudflare R2

features: Added publish skill for uploading files to Cloudflare R2 and sharing via public URL

pr.title: Add advisor skill for rigorous, no-nonsense analysis

features: Added advisor skill for rigorous, no-nonsense analysis with anti-sycophancy rules, cognitive debiasing, and explicit confidence levels
improvements: Added AGENTS.md for cross-agent project conventions
Simplified CLAUDE.md to reference AGENTS.md as single source of truth
